headline: RBC Capital Maintains Outperform on SBA Communications, Lowers Price Target to $210
summary: RBC Capital  analyst Jonathan Atkin   maintains SBA Communications (NASDAQ:SBAC) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $245 to $210.
